title: physostegia virginiana var. obovata
intro: Physostegia virginiana var. obovata, also known as Obovate Snakeroot, is a perennial plant in the Lamiaceae family native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Obovate Snakeroot can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
